name: Caribbean Turkey Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package oven roasted or hickory smoked turkey, about 1½ pounds
3/4 teaspoon onion salt or garlic salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut turkey into ½-inch cubes.
2. Place turkey and all other salad ingredients in a large bowl, except peanuts.
3. Stir together dressing ingredients and pour over turkey mixture.
4. Mix well. Cover and refrigerate for 1-24 hours.
5. Stir peanuts into salad just before serving.
